subcodes.first_line: The sun hath risen, the horizons of the world are radiant with light, and the night of separation hath turned to dawn, for the moment of reunion is at hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوغدی گون آفاق عالم مشرق انواردر صبحه دوندی شام فرقت نوبت دیداردر لوحه دلدن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement, @living waters; water of life
